title: Google and Kaggle’s GenAI Intensive Vibe Coding course 2026

description: Google has been a proud part of Austria’s landscape for years, and today, we’re announcing our first data center in Kronstorf, generating 100 direct jobs. This facility …

description: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.

description: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.

description: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.

description: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web

title: Google hosts AI for the Economy Forum in Washington D.C.
description: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.

title: Flex and Priority tiers in the Gemini API
description:
Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority,
to balance cost and latency.

description: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.

description: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
